title: OreOverlay
description: Client-side Fabric mod for 1.21.11 that predicts nearby ore locations from the world seed and renders colored markers through terrain, hiding them as you mine.
body:
## OreOverlay

OreOverlay is a **client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11** that helps you find ores by **predicting nearby ore locations from a world seed** and drawing them as **colored in-world overlays**.

![OreOverlay preview in-game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/699b9099370bc28042b41318cf0db3fefe5a5c50.png)

Search for a specific ore in-game, load the results instantly, and mine with a clear visual guide without changing server behavior or adding any server-side code.

### Features
- In-game ore search menu
- Colored ore markers rendered through terrain
- Exact local calculation, no external website required
- Reload overlay data without restarting the game
- Markers disappear as you mine the matching block
- Hidden/mined markers are saved separately
- Client-only Fabric mod

![OreOverlay menu showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dcfe07a0a5b1d2e26d44e2b2277859997042956.png)

### Supported Ores
- Diamond
- Redstone
- Gold
- Iron
- Emerald
- Lapis
- Coal
- Copper
- Ancient Debris

### Controls
- `G` - Open ore search
- `O` - Toggle overlay
- `R` - Reload ore data

### Notes
- This mod is **client-side only**
- Designed for **Minecraft 1.21.11**
- Intended for **singleplayer, testing, seed analysis, and technical experimentation**
- Does **not** include server-side code or interact with Minecraft servers
- Always respect the rules of any server or community where you play
